title: The LORD I Will At All Times Ever Bless

verses.text: I sought the LORD and he has answered me, and he from all my terrors set me free. O look to him, be radiant, unashamed! This poor man cried; the LORD from trouble saved. The angel of the LORD encamps around those fearing him, and he delivers them. The Book of Psalms for Sining, 1973; alt

O taste and you will see the LORD is good! How blest the man who puts his trust in him! O fear the LORD, all you he has redeemed! For those who fear him never suffer want. Young lions hunger, they may lack for food; but those who seek the LORD shall have no want. The Book of Psalms for Sining, 1973; alt

O come, you children, listen unto me, And I will teach you how to fear the Lord. Who longs for life –its good –thro’ many days? From evil keep your tongue, your lips from lies. Depart from ev’ry evil way, do good, And ever seek to follow after peace. The Book of Psalms for Sining, 1973; alt
